subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O My handmaiden, inasmuch as thou hast uttered My remembrance, found solace in My praise, and turned towards the Dayspring of My Cause and the Dawning-Place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا امتی بما نطقت بذکری و آنست بثنائی و اقبلت الی مطلع امری و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
